description_long: This is a solid-body electric guitar with a single cutaway design, reminiscent of the classic Les Paul style. The front features a sunburst finish with a gradient from deep red to amber, accented by a white pickguard and metallic control knobs. The neck is long and slender, with visible frets and inlays, leading up to a headstock with three tuning pegs on each side. The back of the guitar is a uniform deep red, with a visible electronics cavity cover. The body is contoured and appears to be made of wood, with metallic hardware for the bridge, pickups, and tuners. The overall construction suggests a robust instrument suitable for urban street performances or music venues.
description: A sunburst-finished, single-cutaway electric guitar with metallic hardware, white pickguard, and a classic Les Paul-inspired shape.
description_view_0: Front view showing the sunburst finish, white pickguard, metallic knobs, and detailed fretboard.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the guitar's thickness, contoured body, and the raised neck profile.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the solid red back, electronics cavity cover, and the back of the headstock.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the edge of the pickguard, bridge, and the depth of the body.
attribute_headstock_design: Three-per-side tuning pegs, classic Les Paul shape, no visible logo
